steps.title: Identify what emphasizing the Mohs scale number means
steps.content: To emphasize a fact means to state it directly as the central focus of the sentence, not as a supporting detail.

steps.title: Find which choice puts fluorite's number at the center
steps.content: C opens with “Fluorite has a Mohs scale number of 4,” positioning fluorite's number as the explicit focus. A presents fluorite's number only as a parenthetical detail while centering quartz; B omits fluorite entirely; D avoids any specific numbers. That matches choice C — C is correct.
